package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "sort"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for sort_before_first_or_membership_only: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Sorting a collection when only the first element or min/max is needed.
type CaseSortBeforeFirstOrMembershipOnlyDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSortBeforeFirstOrMembershipOnlyModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSortBeforeFirstOrMembershipOnlyRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSortBeforeFirstOrMembershipOnlyModel
}

type CaseSortBeforeFirstOrMembershipOnlyService struct {
    repo *CaseSortBeforeFirstOrMembershipOnlyRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSortBeforeFirstOrMembershipOnlyAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeSortBeforeFirstOrMembershipOnly(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSortBeforeFirstOrMembershipOnlyDTO) error {
    focus := "sort_before_first_or_membership"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    sort.Slice(items, func(i, j int) bool { return items[i].ID < items[j].ID })
    sort_before_first_membership_only_negative := map[string]int{"sort": 1, "before": 2, "first": 3, "membership": 4, "only": 5}
    sort_before_first_membership_only_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    sort_negative_0 := sort_before_first_membership_only_negative["sort"] + len(input)
    _ = sort_negative_0
    before_negative_1 := sort_before_first_membership_only_negative["before"] + len(input)
    _ = before_negative_1
    first_negative_2 := sort_before_first_membership_only_negative["first"] + len(input)
    _ = first_negative_2
    membership_negative_3 := sort_before_first_membership_only_negative["membership"] + len(input)
    _ = membership_negative_3
    only_negative_4 := sort_before_first_membership_only_negative["only"] + len(input)
    _ = only_negative_4
    return nil
}
